Total cost discrepancy between DPR and project summary
flags.expected_range: The total cost mentioned in the context is significantly higher than other cost estimates provided (5470.57 Cr, 5982.69 Cr). This could indicate a major discrepancy or an additional phase of the project not accounted for elsewhere.

flags.description: High number of RUBs/LHS relative to stations
flags.expected_range: The total number of RUBs/LHS (79) seems disproportionately high compared to the total number of stations (33). This could indicate an overestimation or misinterpretation in the DPR data.

flags.description: High cost for ROBs
flags.expected_range: The total cost for 2 ROBs is unusually high at 43.97 Cr each, totaling 87.95 Cr. This seems disproportionately expensive compared to other infrastructure costs and may indicate an anomaly or error in the DPR data.

flags.description: High embankment volume relative to cutting volume
flags.expected_range: The ratio of embankment volume to cutting volume is unusually high, suggesting a significant imbalance in earthwork requirements which may not be realistic for the given route length and terrain.

flags.description: High cost for fencing relative to total project cost
flags.expected_range: The cost of 2200 m of fencing is unusually high at 0.0003253 Cr per meter, totaling 30.70 Cr. This seems disproportionately expensive compared to other infrastructure costs and may indicate an anomaly or error in the DPR data.
